Cuddle.definition: a close and affectionate (and often prolonged) embrace
move or arrange oneself in a comfortable and cozy position
hold (a person or thing) close, as for affection, comfort, or warmth

Caress.definition: a gentle affectionate stroking (or something resembling it)
touch or stroke lightly in a loving or endearing manner

Romantic.definition: expressive of or exciting sexual love or romance

Love.definition: a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

Close.definition: come together, as if in an embrace

Pet.definition: a domesticated animal kept for companionship or amusement

Intimate.definition: someone to whom private matters are confided

Together.definition: in contact with each other or in proximity

Affectionate.definition: having or displaying warmth or affection

Kiss.definition: the act of caressing with the lips (or an instance thereof)

Gentle.definition: soft and mild; not harsh or stern or severe

Loving.definition: have a great affection or liking for
be enamored or in love with

Sweet.definition: pleasing to the mind or feeling

Embrace.definition: the act of clasping another person in the arms (as in greeting or affection)

Comfort.definition: a state of being relaxed and feeling no pain

Closeness.definition: a feeling of being intimate and belonging together
